title: Ahtna 50th Anniversary: Our Past, Our Future
summary: This video was produced by Ahtna, Incorporated in celebration of our 50th anniversary. Ahtna was incorporated on June 23, 1972. We would not be where we are without the wisdom and guidance of our Elders and early leaders. They instilled in our minds that our lands are our corporation’s most precious...

title: Corn planted acreage down 4% from 2021,Soybean acreage up 1% from last year
summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture's National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) estimated 89.9 million acres of corn planted in the United States for 2022, down 4% from last year, according to the Acreage report released today.
